mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.member_id, p.created_at, p.updated_at, m.nickname FROM post p JOIN member m ON p.member_id = m.id ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.member_id, p.created_at, p.updated_at, m.nickname FROM post p JOIN member m ON p.member_id = m.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (title, content, member_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{memberId})
